lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining on the upholstery. The car is functional, though it may require minor maintenance in the near future.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show noticeable wear and tear from regular use. It is currently operational, though it may require some maintenance or minor repairs.

Looking for a dependable vehicle that's ready for its next chapter? This car is in fair condition and has plenty of life left in it! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years of service, it remains a functional and straightforward choice for anyone seeking value. It's a great opportunity to get into a solid model at an accessible price point!

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom-ready condition, looking and driving exactly as it did when new. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with no scratches, chips, or dings. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with leather that remains supple and all electronics functioning perfectly. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, with a full service history and absolutely no mechanical issues. It represents the highest standard for any collector or enthusiast seeking a truly mint example.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though there are a few minor rock chips on the front bumper and a small scratch on the passenger door. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors, with only slight wear visible on the driver’s seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine runs smoothly without any leaks, and the transmission shifts as it should. We recently performed a full synthetic oil change and inspected the brakes, which have plenty of life left. The tires are in decent shape with approximately 60% tread remaining. This is a reliable vehicle that is ready for its next owner without needing immediate repairs.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist, balancing mechanical precision with an impressive aesthetic presentation. Rigorously inspected to ensure consistent performance, the automobile features a well-preserved cabin and a documented history of responsible ownership. It stands as a testament to durability and sophisticated engineering, offering an exceptional driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s still got plenty of life left? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been absolute gold for me! It’s in solid shape, runs like a dream, and has been really well-taken care of over the years. It's perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. I’m looking to find it a great new home quickly, so I’ve priced it to move. Come take her for a spin—you’re gonna love how she handles!

This E92 M3 is a purist’s specification, featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 paired with a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox. The engine utilizes individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS for instantaneous throttle response across the power band. It benefits from a well-maintained cooling system and a rigid chassis with M-specific kinematics
Used car in good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, though close inspection reveals minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free sanctuary featuring supple upholstery, a pristine dashboard, and a fully functional suite of modern tech features. Under the hood, the engine purrs with the confidence of a car that has never missed a scheduled service, complemented by a smooth-shifting transmission and responsive handling. Recently fitted with premium tires and fresh brakes, this car is mechanically sound and aesthetically impressive. It represents an excellent opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking a high-quality, dependable driver that looks as good as it performs.

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity to acquire a well-maintained asset that balances performance with enduring value. Demonstrating consistent care and mechanical reliability, it offers a sophisticated driving experience. We invite serious inquiries for this distinguished example of automotive engineering.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile that has been preserved with professional care. Secure this investment in automotive excellence today.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, making it a reliable companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. Everything runs smoothly and it's totally ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin—I think you’re really going to love how it handles!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with factory individual throttle bodies. This example has been meticulously maintained, with recent VANOS servicing and proactive rear subframe reinforcement already completed. The drivetrain delivers linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. Suspension geometry remains tight with upgraded poly-bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers, ensuring optimal turn-in and lateral stability. Cosmetically honest with minor patina consistent with a driver’s car, it remains an exceptional analog performance machine for the discerning purist.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable engine. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior finish retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only minor, expected road wear that is barely noticeable to the casual eye. Inside, the cabin is a testament to careful ownership; the premium upholstery remains supple and clean, while all electronic features—including the premium sound system and climate control—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a consistent service schedule and a recent full synthetic oil change and tire rotation. The engine pulls smoothly, the brakes are firm, and the suspension provides a comfortable, quiet ride. Included with the sale are all original manuals and a documented service history, ensuring total peace of mind for the next owner.

This expertly maintained vehicle offers a compelling combination of mechanical reliability and aesthetic preservation. Demonstrating consistent care and structural integrity, it provides a refined driving experience suitable for the most discerning professional. With its documented service history and balanced performance characteristics, this unit stands as a premier example of quality and value within its segment.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a refined balance of performance and reliability. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this unit demonstrates mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber driving experience without the premium of a showroom-new price point. This vehicle stands as a testament to diligent care and remains prepared for immediate, long-term service.

Hey there! Are you looking for a super reliable ride that’s been treated with lots of love? I’m parting with my car, and it’s honestly such a gem! It runs smoothly, looks great inside and out, and is totally ready for your next road trip. I’ve kept up with everything, so you can just hop in and go. Let's get you behind the wheel!
This E92 M3 features the iconic S65 4.0L V8, a high-revving masterpiece with an 8,4
Used car. Solid condition. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear. Clean title. Maintenance up to date.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior finish retains a deep, impressive luster, having been garage-kept and frequently detailed; while it shows a few minor stone chips on the front hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper consistent with careful use, the body lines are straight and the paint is vibrant. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free. The premium leather upholstery remains supple, showing only light softening on the driver’s side bolster, and all interior electronics—including the premium sound system and navigation—operate exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a comprehensive service history with its most recent oil change and multi-point inspection completed just last month. It shifts smoothly, brakes firmly, and sits on a set of high-quality tires with plenty of tread life remaining. This is a solid, honest car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. The exterior maintains a commendable finish, while the interior provides a sophisticated environment for the discerning driver. Offering a balanced synthesis of value and quality, this vehicle represents a premier choice for those who prioritize both excellence and longevity in their automotive investments.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies both mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a thorough inspection, this automobile delivers a composed driving experience and remains in commendable condition. It serves as an ideal acquisition for those seeking a premium balance of performance and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure! If you're looking for a reliable car that still looks great on the road, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used vehicle in good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. The exterior features a lustrous metallic finish that still catches the light beautifully, with only minor road-wear consistent with careful, respectful use over the years. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin appointed with premium leather seating and high-end materials. While there is slight natural creasing on the driver’s bolster, the interior remains remarkably fresh and all technological features—from the multi-zone climate control to the premium infotainment system—function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is in robust health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent comprehensive inspection, oil change, and brake service already completed. The engine pulls strongly and the transmission shifts with precision, offering a smooth and confident driving experience. This is an honest, well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without the need for any upcoming maintenance. Full service history and documentation are available for your peace of mind.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been meticulously maintained, ensuring it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. While it reflects the character of a well-enjoyed vehicle, its service history remains exemplary, offering the discerning buyer a balanced synthesis of value and prestige. We invite you to experience the superior road presence and enduring quality of this distinguished selection.
